chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3034 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 13592/2024 2. For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah Advocate for the Petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Zohaib Korai Advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Zohaib Advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajper Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press this petition for the time being, therefore, the petition may be dismissed as withdrawn leaving the Petitioner at liberty to agitate any fresh grievance as and when it occurs. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
